description: Use this API to remove a machine protection model attached to the specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = cctmcnpmod_remove(ibus, id, model)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model to be removed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no machine protection model at this machine.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
